name: hb_1_18
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd. over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 compute and store: peak_flue_gas, mean_flue_gas, std_flue_gas (float), peak_flue_gas_offset_hours (whole hours from 2025-06-10 00:00 to the peak, int), surge_hours (count of hours with flue-gas above mean+1 std, int).

turns.query: Analyze the emission surge periods of Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd. and analyze their frequency patterns during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
